description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image registry.gitlab.com/fdroid/ci-images-server:latest. Add a job named check_new_issues that runs in the default stage and executes the following script steps: test -d fdroidserver || mkdir fdroidserver; curl --silent https://gitlab.com/eighthave/fdroidserver/repository/master/archive.tar.gz | tar -xz --directory=fdroidserver --strip-components=1; export PATH="`pwd`/fdroidserver:$PATH"; pyvenv --system-site-packages --clear issuebot-env; . issuebot-env/bin/activate; pip3 install python-gitlab wheel gplaycli; ./.issuebot.py. The job has no artifacts, caches, or rules and runs on every pipeline.
